project.contact: Open an issue in the project repository or contact the maintainer.
controller.Win32-Front.label: Desktop - Live Capture
controller.Win32-Front.description: Uses live desktop capture and sends mouse input through window messages to avoid repeatedly stealing foreground focus.
controller.Win32-Window-Background.label: Desktop - Background Window
controller.Win32-Window-Background.descr: Sends mouse messages to the target window in the background. Availability depends on target window support.
resource.default.label: Default Resource
group.assist.label: Assist
task.ContinuousThrow.label: Continuous Throw Mode
task.ContinuousThrow.description: Runs repeated left mouse clicks. Duration mode uses preset total duration and interval combinations; count mode supports custom count and interval. No Python agent is required.
option.ContinuousThrowClickParams.label: Click Parameters
option.ContinuousThrowClickParams.descri: Controls each click hold duration and click position.
option.ContinuousThrowClickParams.inputs: How long each left button press is held. Range: 1-100000.
Horizontal coordinate in the 1280x720 design resolution. Range: 0-1280.
Vertical coordinate in the 1280x720 design resolution. Range: 0-720.
option.ContinuousThrowRunMode.label: Run Mode
option.ContinuousThrowRunMode.descriptio: Choose the stop condition for repeated clicks. Duration and count are mutually exclusive.
option.ContinuousThrowDurationPreset.des: Select total duration and click interval. Actual total time also includes each click hold duration.
option.ContinuousThrowCount.label: Click Count
option.ContinuousThrowCount.description: Stop automatically after the configured number of clicks.
option.ContinuousThrowCountInterval.desc: Delay between clicks when running by click count.
option.ContinuousThrowCountInterval.inpu: Delay after each click completes. Range: 10-999999.
